name: base-monitor
description: Sistema de monitorização de anúncios de contratação pública do portal BASE

scripts.setup:base: npx supabase start && npx supabase db reset && npm run import-cpvs
scripts.setup: npm run setup:base && copy /Y .env supabase\functions\.env && start "BASE Monitor Functions" cmd /k "cd /d %CD% && npx supabase functions serve --env-file supabase/functions/.env" && start "BASE Monitor Web" cmd /k "cd /d %CD%\apps\web && npm install && npm run dev"
scripts.dev: cd apps/web && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.import-cpvs: cd scripts && npm install && npx tsx import-cpvs.ts
scripts.cron: cd supabase/cron && npm install && npx tsx run.ts
scripts.cron:once: cd supabase/cron && npm install && npx tsx run.ts --once
